---
title: "W07-Reflection Essay-Introduction to Positron"
author: "Mia Polito"
date: '`r format(Sys.time())`'
format: 
  html: 
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 4
    number-sections: true
    code-link: true
    embed-resources: true
editor: visual
execute: 
  freeze: auto
---

# Download and Install Positron

## **Prompt:** As you watch the videos in Step 1 and Step 3, follow the activities in the video and be familiar with Positron.
